name: Marketing Copy — Generation Quality
description: Open-ended marketing copy generation scored by an LLM judge on correctness, clarity, persuasion and actionability. Original briefs.

items.prompt: Write a 3-sentence launch announcement for 'Crucible', an AI model benchmarking platform for ML engineers. Emphasize rigor, multi-model comparison, and safety testing. Avoid hype words like 'revolutionary'.
Write a cold email (under 120 words) to a skeptical CTO to book a demo of an AI evaluation platform. Include a clear subject line and one specific value proposition.
Draft 3 distinct value propositions for a team productivity app, each targeting a different segment (startups, enterprises, freelancers). One line each.
Write an SEO-friendly product description (about 60 words) for noise-cancelling headphones aimed at remote workers. Mention one concrete benefit and a subtle call to action.
Create a punchy tagline and a one-paragraph elevator pitch for a budgeting app for students. Keep the tone friendly and trustworthy.
Write a LinkedIn post (under 150 words) announcing that your SaaS reached 10,000 users. Make it credible, gracious to the team, and include one lesson learned.
